Rings.name: Life Ring
Rings.description: • Can be selected as a Burial Gift during character creation. Can be bought from the Shrine Handmaid in the Firelink Shrine for 1500 souls after acquiring the Dreamchaser's Ashes.

Rings.name: Sun Princess Ring
Rings.description: • Found in Anor Londo. After defeating Aldrich, Devourer of Gods, take either elevator up to Gwynevere's bedchamber.

Rings.name: Estus Ring
Rings.description: • Found at the bottom of the Tower on the left side of the Firelink Shrine. Requires the Tower Key, sold by the Shrine Handmaid in Firelink Shrine for 20,000 Souls.

Rings.name: Ashen Estus Ring
Rings.description: • Located in the Untended Graves. From the first bonfire head to the left most path. The ring is in the coffin surrounded by Corvians.

Rings.name: Chloranthy Ring
Rings.description: • Found in Undead Settlement. After defeating the Demon alongside Siegward of Catarina, scale the nearby building and exit onto the adjacent tower by jumping from the roof. Maneuvering down the tower, the ring will be located under several wooden boxes near the Mirrah Armor Set.

Rings.name: Havel's Ring
Rings.description: • Soul Transposition using Soul of a Stray Demon Defeat Sulyvahn's Beasts near Archdeacon McDonnell. Soul Transposition using Soul of Champion Gundyr. Found in the boss arena where you fight the Ancient Wyvern. After entering through the fog gate, head up the stairs until you locate the bell. Then proceed to the right, downstairs. There are three items lying on the ground. Next to the items is a thin ledge that players can walk along. At the end of the path is the ring.

Rings.name: Ring of Favor
Rings.description: • Dropped by the Sulyvahn's Beast in the hidden water reserve area accessed via illusory wall in the Irithyll of the Boreal Valley.

Rings.name: Prisoner's Chain
Rings.description: • Soul Transposition using the Soul of Champion Gundyr.

Rings.name: Ring of Steel Protection
Rings.description: • Found in Archdragon Peak. Proceed through the Ancient Wyvern boss area to the bell, and look over the ledge to the right.

Rings.name: Magic Stoneplate Ring
Rings.description: • Dropped from the greatsword-wielding Consumed King's Knight guarding Oceiros, the Consumed King.

Rings.name: Flame Stoneplate Ring
Rings.description: • Found on a corpse hanging at a tree overlooking the entrance of the tower with the giant in it at Undead Settlement (the same area where you enter the cage to join the Mound Makers).

Rings.name: Thunder Stoneplate Ring
Rings.description: • Archdragon Peak: From the second bonfire, proceed through the area until you get outside, then near the wooden scaffold there is a ladder which leads to the ring

Rings.name: Dark Stoneplate Ring
Rings.description: • In Anor Londo, following the Pontiff Sulyvahn bonfire. The ring will be guarded by Irithyllian Slaves in an area beneath the Deacons casting Fireball.

Rings.name: Speckled Stoneplate Ring
Rings.description: • Found on a corpse in Smouldering Lake, behind a destructible wall on the other side from which you enter. Lure a ballista shot to break the wall apart.

Rings.name: Bloodbite Ring
Rings.description: • Undead Settlement, in the sewers below Cliff Underside bonfire or beside the Dilapidated Bridge bonfire. The Large Hound-Rat will drop the ring.

Rings.name: Poisonbite Ring
Rings.description: • Near the first short cut at Cathedral of the Deep behind the Ravenous Crystal Lizard.

Rings.name: Cursebite Ring
Rings.description: • Profaned Capital, toxic swamp in the cave under the wooden bridge.

Rings.name: Fleshbite Ring
Rings.description: • Grand Archives, near the top floor of building just beyond the area with a balcony overhead and multiple Scholars, there will be a set of bookcases to the right of the stairs which lead you to the room. The ring will be located in the corner past the Clawed Curses.

Rings.name: Knight's Ring
Rings.description: • Lothric Castle, near the Sunlight Shrine.

Rings.name: Hunter's Ring
Rings.description: • Grand Archives- Found at the top of a tower surrounded by three golden Winged Knights before the stairs to Prince Lothric.

Rings.name: Scholar Ring
Rings.description: • Grand Archives - Facing the wooden bridge where the Crystal Sage teleports to, there is a lever to the right, tucked between the bridge and the bookcases. The ring is on a corpse in a chair in the revealed area.

Rings.name: Priestess Ring
Rings.description: • Sold by the Shrine Handmaid in Untended Graves.Dropped by the Shrine Handmaid in Untended Graves, even if you've already purchased it from her.

Rings.name: Covetous Gold Serpent Ring
Rings.description: • Found next to Siegward of Catarina when he is trapped in Irithyll Dungeon.

Rings.name: Covetous Silver Serpent Ring
Rings.description: • In a chest behind an illusory wall at the top of Firelink Shrine. Located behind Picklepum's indoor nest.

Rings.name: Saint's Ring
Rings.description:
• Sold by Irina of Carim for 300 souls.
  • Sold by Shrine Handmaid for 300 souls, only after giving Irina's Ashes.

Rings.name: Deep Ring
Rings.description: • Drops from a Deacon in a tower outside the Cathedral of the Deep.

Rings.name: Darkmoon Ring
Rings.description: • Rank 1 covenant reward: Blade of the Darkmoon.

Rings.name: Young Dragon Ring
Rings.description: • Starting equipment for the Sorcerer. Given by Orbeck of Vinheim after purchasing several spells.

Rings.name: Bellowing Dragoncrest Ring
Rings.description: • From the Irithyll Dungeon bonfire, head straight into the large room and then turn right, proceed until the end of the corridor and open the gate with the Jailbreaker's Key. The ring is on the rocks below.

Rings.name: Great Swamp Ring
Rings.description: • Starting equipment for the Pyromancer. Dropped by the Great Crab, up the ladder near the Farron Keep bonfire in the Road of Sacrifices.

Rings.name: Witch's Ring
Rings.description: • Catacombs of Carthus: just after the stray demon, walking towards the 'Abandoned Tomb' Bonfire, there will be a corpse holding the ring at the end of a hallway.

Rings.name: Morne's Ring
Rings.description: • Under the bridge between the 1st and 2nd bonfires of Road of Sacrifices. There is an area to the right of the bridge's beginning where players may drop down into the cave. In Irithyll of the Boreal Valley. From Pontiff Sulyvahn's room, head back out towards the railing and fall straight onto the altar below.

Rings.name: Ring of the Sun's First Born
Rings.description: • Found in Irithyll of the Boreal Valley. Drop down from the ledge right outside the Pontiff Sulyvahn boss room.

Rings.name: Lingering Dragoncrest Ring
Rings.description: • Farron Keep, Keep Ruins bonfire. Drops from the Great Crab patrolling a white birch tree.

Rings.name: Sage Ring
Rings.description: • Found to the left of the swamp area of Road of Sacrifices inside a room with an enemy.

Rings.name: Dusk Crown Ring
Rings.description: • Located in the Irithyll Dungeon. The ring is in a cell beside the open area with six patrolling Jailers.

Rings.name: Leo Ring
Rings.description: • Found in a chest on the second floor of the room with Gwynevere's painting in Irithyll of the Boreal Valley. Just beyond where either Siegward of Catarina is located during his questline or, more commonly notable, the Estus Soup is placed.

Rings.name: Wolf Ring
Rings.description: • Rank 2 covenant reward: Watchdogs of Farron.

Rings.name: Hawk Ring
Rings.description: • Dropped from the Giantat the top of the tower in the Undead Settlement, upon his death.

Rings.name: Hornet Ring
Rings.description: • Found in Untended Graves, behind a Black Knight standing guard where the Starved Hound is found when at the Firelink Shrine.

Rings.name: Knight Slayer's Ring
Rings.description: • Defeating the dark phantom of Knight Slayer Tsorig at Catacomb of Carthus. Location to summon him is in a barred area beside the Skeleton Ball's path or the Hound-Rats. Or if the invasion was skipped, gained from killing Knight Slayer Tsorig at Smouldering Lake. After the basilisks, turn left at the bottom of the stairs.

Rings.name: Ring of the Evil Eye
Rings.description: • Quest Reward: Anri of Astora. Obtained when Anri relocates to the Church of Yorshka.

Rings.name: Farron Ring
Rings.description: • Acquired by talking to Hawkwood after defeating the Abyss Watchers.

Rings.name: Dragonscale Ring
Rings.description: • Found in the Consumed King's Garden. When taking the second elevator in the area which grants a shortcut, get off early to reach a ledge with a Lothric Priest. The ring will be beside him.

Rings.name: Horsehoof Ring
Rings.description: • Sold by Unbreakable Patches for 500 souls.Dropped by Unbreakable Patches upon his death.

Rings.name: Wood Grain Ring
Rings.description: • Purchased from the Shrine Handmaid after Easterner's Ashes is turned in.

Rings.name: Flynn's Ring
Rings.description: • Looted from a corpse on the top of a roof at Undead Settlement: In the area where you fight the Fire Demon with Siegward of Catarina.

Rings.name: Magic Clutch Ring
Rings.description: • Irithyll of the Boreal Valley- From the Church of Yorshka bonfire, go back the way you came from. Head down the curved staircase and then left through the archway. Ahead up more stairs and to the right of the Fire witch and 2 Pontiff Knights is an illusionary wall. Behind which you'll find the ring.

Rings.name: Fire Clutch Ring
Rings.description: • On a corpse in the Undead Settlement. Behind the gallows on a wooden bridge, an area directly above the Cliff Underside Bonfire.

Rings.name: Lightning Clutch Ring
Rings.description: • On a corpse in Archdragon Peak, to the left of the gate that leads to the Ancient Wyvern.

Rings.name: Dark Clutch Ring
Rings.description: • Dropped by a mimic in the Irithyll Dungeon. After passing the giant there is a hallway with rats. The mimic is at the end of the hallway on the left side.

Rings.name: Red Tearstone Ring
Rings.description: • Lothric Castle- Facing away from the Dragonslayer Armour Boss, to the left there is an elevator. Beside the elevator is a door to the balcony. Follow the balcony to the right to find this ring.

Rings.name: Blue Tearstone Ring
Rings.description: • Given by Greirat of the Undead Settlement.

Rings.name: Lloyd's Sword Ring
Rings.description: • On a corpse inside Cathedral of the Deep, near the entrance on a ledge next to the Giant who attacks you when running by.

Rings.name: Lloyd's Shield Ring
Rings.description: • Can be bought from the Shrine Handmaid, after Paladin's Ashes are given to her. Found within the Catacombs of Carthus just after the first bonfire in a room with many vases. Found at Catacombs of Carthus, from the second bonfire past the wheel skeletons.

Rings.name: Carthus Milkring
Rings.description: • Found in the Catacombs of Carthus in the room with the many bone-filled pots.

Rings.name: Carthus Bloodring
Rings.description: • Found in the Catacombs of Carthus, at the end of the hallway with the wheel skeletons.

Rings.name: Pontiff's Right Eye
Rings.description: • Located in the Irithyll of the Boreal Valley. Drops from the Sulyvahn's Beast, who spawns either on the bridge entering Irithyll, or the water below the bridge if you fail to kill it the first time.

Rings.name: Pontiff's Left Eye
Rings.description: • Soul Transposition using Soul of Boreal Valley Vordt.

Rings.name: Aldrich's Ruby
Rings.description: • Dropped by the Deep Accursed in Anor Londo.

Rings.name: Aldrich's Sapphire
Rings.description: • Dropped by the Deep Accursed in the Cathedral of the Deep.

Rings.name: Silvercat Ring
Rings.description: • Given by Sirris of the Sunless Realms after helping her defeat Creighton in Irithyll of the Boreal Valley. Given by Orbeck of Vinheim after you have purchased Aural Decoy, Farron Flashsword,Pestilent Mist, and Spook, along with the 'Silent Ally' gesture.

Rings.name: Slumbering Dragoncrest Ring
Rings.description: • Given by Orbeck of Vinheim after you purchase Aural Decoy, Farron Flashsword, Pestilent Mist, and Spook.

Rings.name: Obscuring Ring
Rings.description: • Rank 1 covenant reward: Rosaria's Fingers. Note: in order to get this ring and the Silvercat Ring in one playthrough, only offer the Pale Tongues to Rosaria after getting the Silvercat ring from Sirris of the Sunless Realms.

Rings.name: Untrue Dark Ring
Rings.description: • Purchased from Yuria of Londor.

Rings.name: Untrue White Ring
Rings.description: • Purchased from Yuria of Londor.

Rings.name: Reversal Ring
Rings.description: • Found in the Darkmoon Tomb in Anor Londo to the right of the altar. For reference, the Darkmoon Tomb is hidden behind an illusory wall in the circular room before the lever which controls the platform leading to the Anor Londo bonfire.

Rings.name: Skull Ring
Rings.description: • Dropped from Ludleth of Courland when killed or can be obtained by visiting his throne before beginning the next Journey.

Rings.name: Calamity Ring
Rings.description: • Received by using the Path of the Dragon gesture in front of the dragon statue in the Dragonkin Mausoleum at Archdragon Peak.

Rings.name: Ring of Sacrifice
Rings.description: • Sold by Yuria of Londor or found on a corpse at the High Wall of Lothric below the dragon.

Gestures.name: Beckon
Gestures.description: • Received from Yoel of Londor. Talk to him near the Foot of the High Wall bonfire and take him into your service. Talk to him again in Firelink Shrine to get the gesture.

Gestures.name: Call Over
Gestures.description: • Received after you trade a Homeward Bone with the Pump-a-Rum Crow.

Gestures.name: Welcome
Gestures.description: • Received from Cornyx of the Great Swamp. Talk to him in the Undead Settlement and accept his services. Then talk to him in Firelink Shrine, leave the conversation, and talk to him again to receive this gesture.

Gestures.name: Applause
Gestures.description:
• Received from Ringfinger Leonhard:
    1. Talk to him once he appears in Firelink Shrine. He will give you five Cracked Red Eye Orbs.
    2. Talk to him again after acquiring a Pale Tongue and he will give you the Lift Chamber Key.
    3. Unlock the door at the lowest level below the Tower on the Wall bonfire and descend the lift. Kill the Darkwraith to receive a Red Eye Orb.
    4. Talk to Leonhard afterward and he will give you the gesture.

Gestures.name: Quiet Resolve
Gestures.description: • Received from Anri of Astora near the Church of Yorshka bonfire in Irithyll of the Boreal Valley, if you are following his/her questline.

Gestures.name: Rejoice
Gestures.description: • Received from Siegward of Catarina after you give him his armor just outside the Cleansing Chapel in the Cathedral of the Deep.

Gestures.name: Hurrah!
Gestures.description: • Received after selecting 'Talk' twice to Blacksmith Andre.

Gestures.name: Praise the Sun
Gestures.description: • Received after praying at the Altar of Sunlight in Lothric Castle. [Video Location]

Gestures.name: My Thanks!
Gestures.description: • Received from Knight Slayer Tsorig upon killing him or being killed by him, either as an invader in the Catacombs of Carthus or as an NPC in Smouldering Lake near the lake of fire with the bridge leading to a ladder to the ballista above it.

Gestures.name: Proper Bow
Gestures.description:
• Received upon summoning Yellowfinger Heysel in Farron Keep:
    1. Offer a Pale Tongue to Rosaria, Mother of Rebirth.
    2. Yellowfinger Heysel's summon sign will appear next to the tower full of slugs near the Keep Ruins bonfire.
    Notes:
    • Abyss Watchers must still be alive.
    • Giving a Pale Tongue to Rosaria, Mother of Rebirth will cause Sirris of the Sunless Realms' questline to fail and you will not be able to receive the Silvercat Ring, Sunset Armor Set, Sunset Shield, Sunless Talisman, Dragonslayer's Axe, or the Mirrah Chain Set (and Darkmoon Loyalty, if you didn't get it before) until the next NG cycle. However, she can be killed in Firelink Shrine to receive the Sunless Set and Sunless Talisman from the Shrine Handmaid if her quest has failed.
    • There is a cap of 99 Pale Tongues you can offer. If you reach this limit, you can't offer more, and, consequently, you can't gain this gesture anymore. Pale Tongues used for respecs don't count toward the 99 limit.

Gestures.name: Dignified Bow
Gestures.description: • Received from talking to Yuria of Londor.

Gestures.name: Duel Bow
Gestures.description: • Received upon summoning the Londor Pale Shade once you have five Dark Sigils. Can be summoned near the Farron Keep Perimeter bonfire for the Abyss Watchers fight, or outside the fog gate for the Pontiff Sulyvahn fight if you are following the Lord of Hollows questline. Note that while the Londor Pale Shade can be summoned for the Soul of Cinder fight, doing this will not grant you the gesture.

Gestures.name: Legion Etiquette
Gestures.description: • Received from the Old Wolf of Farron after praying to it near the Old Wolf of Farron bonfire within Farron Keep.

Gestures.name: Darkmoon Loyalty
Gestures.description: • Received from speaking with Sirris of the Sunless Realms in Firelink Shrine after giving the Dreamchaser's Ashes to the Shrine Handmaid, if done before offering a Pale Tongue to Rosaria

Gestures.name: By My Sword
Gestures.description: • Received from summoning Black Hand Gotthard, either before the Abyss Watchers or Pontiff Sulyvahn fights.

Gestures.name: Prayer
Gestures.description: • Received from Irina of Carim. Talk to her for the first time in the Undead Settlement, and agree to touch her.

Gestures.name: Silent Ally
Gestures.description: • Received from Orbeck of Vinheim after purchasing Aural Decoy, Farron Flashsword, Pestilent Mist, and Spook. Talk to him again after purchasing these spells, and he will give you this gesture.

Gestures.name: Collapse
Gestures.description: • Received from Hawkwood the Deserter after talking to him for the first time.

Gestures.name: Patches Squat
Gestures.description: • Received from Unbreakable Patches. Talk to him in Firelink Shrine, then reload the area and he will be in this pose; talk to him to receive the gesture. Can also be received from Lapp at the beginning of the Shared Grave in The Ringed City at the bottom of the staircase.

Gestures.name: Prostration
Gestures.description: • Received from Unbreakable Patches, after replying "No" when he asks for forgiveness in Firelink Shrine, or after confronting him in the Cathedral of the Deep after he lowers the bridge with "You know who I am".

Gestures.name: Toast
Gestures.description: • Received from Siegward of Catarina. Talk to him after defeating the Demon in the Undead Settlement, or talk to him in the kitchen near the Distant Manor bonfire in Irithyll of the Boreal Valley if previously missed.

Gestures.name: Sleep
Gestures.description: • Received from Siegward of Catarina. Talk to him after receiving the 'Toast' gesture after defeating the Demon in the Undead Settlement, or talk to him in the kitchen near the Distant Manor bonfire in Irithyll of the Boreal Valley after receiving the 'Toast' gesture if previously missed.

Gestures.name: Curl Up
Gestures.description: • Received from Greirat of the Undead Settlement. Give him Loretta's Bone in Firelink Shrine, then reload the area and talk to him to receive the gesture.

Gestures.name: Stretch Out
Gestures.description: • Found in the Profaned Capital on poor Laddersmith Gilligan's corpse next to the Profaned Capital bonfire.

Gestures.name: Path of The Dragon
Gestures.description: • Found on a Drakeblood Knight's corpse in the hallway past the Oceiros, the Consumed King fight. Gesture required to access Archdragon Peak. [Video Location]

Miracles.name: Heal Aid
Miracles.description:
• Starting spell for Herald
  • Purchased from Shrine Handmaid for 500 souls

Miracles.name: Heal
Miracles.description:
• Starting spell for Cleric
  • Purchased from Irina of Carim for 1,000 souls

Miracles.name: Med Heal
Miracles.description: • Purchased from Irina of Carim for 3500 souls

Miracles.name: Great Heal
Miracles.description: • Found at corpse in the Irithyll of the Boreal Valley

Miracles.name: Soothing Sunlight
Miracles.description: • Acquired by Soul of the Dancer Transposition

Miracles.name: Replenishment
Miracles.description: • Purchased from Irina of Carim for 1000 souls

Miracles.name: Bountiful Light
Miracles.description: • Purchased from Irina of Carim for 5000 souls

Miracles.name: Bountiful Sunlight
Miracles.description: • Acquired by Soul of Rosaria Transposition

Miracles.name: Caressing Tears
Miracles.description: • Purchased from Irina of Carim for 1500 souls

Miracles.name: Tears of Denial
Miracles.description: • Purchased from Irina of Carim for 10000 souls

Miracles.name: Homeward
Miracles.description: • Purchased from Irina of Carim for 3000 souls

Miracles.name: Seek Guidance
Miracles.description: • Looted from a corpse in Cathedral of the Deep. Just past the first giant and down the stairs to the left. It's a sort of dark-ish room above the Cathedral Knight with the mace

Miracles.name: Sacred Oath
Miracles.description: • Warriors of Sunlight Rank 1 reward

Miracles.name: Force
Miracles.description:
• Starting spell for Cleric
  • Purchased from Irina of Carim for 1000 souls

Miracles.name: Emit Force
Miracles.description: • Acquired by Siegward of Catarina during third encounter. Below Irithyll of the Boreal Valley in a kitchen just after a sewer area

Miracles.name: Wrath of the Gods
Miracles.description: • Acquired by dropping from the ledge near the spellcaster on the roof in Profaned Capital

Miracles.name: Lightning Spear
Miracles.description: • Use the elevator near the Old Wolf of Farron and take the stairs up. Turn to the right and run to the closed gate. On the right side of the gate drop down and follow the path, one of the items there is Lightning Spear

Miracles.name: Great Lightning Spear
Miracles.description: • Warriors of Sunlight Rank 2 reward

Miracles.name: Sunlight Spear
Miracles.description: • Acquired by Soul of the Lords Transposition

Miracles.name: Lightning Stake
Miracles.description: • Dropped by the giant worm just before the Old Demon King boss fight

Miracles.name: Lightning Storm
Miracles.description: • Acquired by Soul of the Nameless King Transposition

Miracles.name: Divine Pillars of Light
Miracles.description: • Found at the top of the Grand Archives in a room after defeating three Ascended Winged Knights on the rooftops before the stairs leading to the boss encounter

Miracles.name: Blessed Weapon
Miracles.description: • Sold by Irina of Carim for 8000 souls

Miracles.name: Lightning Blade
Miracles.description: • Located in Irithyll Dungeon. Can be found in the area near the broken dragon statue used to reach the Archdragon Peak

Miracles.name: Darkmoon Blade
Miracles.description: • Blades of the Darkmoon Covenant Rank 2 reward

Miracles.name: Magic Barrier
Miracles.description: • Sold by Irina of Carim for 5000 souls

Miracles.name: Great Magic Barrier
Miracles.description: • Archdragon Peak: Found off a ledge where you find Havel and a dead dragon

Miracles.name: Dark Blade
Miracles.description: • Purchased from Irina of Carim or Karla for 10000 souls

Miracles.name: Vow of Silence
Miracles.description: • Purchased from Irina of Carim or Karla for 15000 souls

Miracles.name: Dead Again
Miracles.description: • Purchased from Irina of Carim or Karla for 5000 souls

Miracles.name: Atonement
Miracles.description: • Farron Keep Perimeter bonfire. Turn around 180 degrees and follow the path until you reach a hole in the wall on your right. Drop down on the ledge below. The spell will be on a corpse

Miracles.name: Deep Protection
Miracles.description: • Purchased from Irina of Carim or Karla for 4000 souls

Miracles.name: Gnaw
Miracles.description: • Purchased from Irina of Carim or Karla for 2000 souls

Miracles.name: Dorhy's Gnawing
Miracles.description: • Guaranteed kill reward from the screaming Evangelist in Irithyll of the Boreal Valley, found behind an illusory wall (fence).

Miracles.name: Lifehunt Scythe
Miracles.description: • Acquired from Soul of Aldrich Transposition

Sorceries.name: Soul Arrow
Sorceries.description:
• Sold by Yoel of Londor for 1,000 souls
  • Sold by Yuria of Londor for 1,000 souls
  • Sold by Orbeck of Vinheim for 1,000 souls
  • Starting Equipment for the Sorcerer

Sorceries.name: Great Soul Arrow
Sorceries.description: • Sold by Orbeck of Vinheim for 3,000 souls

Sorceries.name: Heavy Soul Arrow
Sorceries.description:
• Sold by Yoel of Londor for 2,000 souls
  • Sold by Yuria of Londor for 2,000 souls
  • Sold by Orbeck of Vinheim for 2,000 souls
  • Starting Equipment for the Sorcerer

Sorceries.name: Great Heavy Soul Arrow
Sorceries.description: • Sold by Orbeck of Vinheim for 4,000 souls

Sorceries.name: Farron Dart
Sorceries.description:
• Sold by Yoel of Londor for 1,000 souls
  • Sold by Orbeck of Vinheim for 500 souls
  • Sold by Shrine Handmaid for 1,000 souls

Sorceries.name: Great Farron Dart
Sorceries.description: • Sold by Orbeck of Vinheim for 2,000 souls

Sorceries.name: Farron Hail
Sorceries.description: • Sold by Orbeck of Vinheim for 5,000 souls

Sorceries.name: Homing Soulmass
Sorceries.description: • Sold by Orbeck of Vinheim for 6,000 souls

Sorceries.name: Homing Crystal Soulmass
Sorceries.description: • Sold by Orbeck of Vinheim for 18,000 souls

Sorceries.name: Crystal Hail
Sorceries.description: • Obtained by Soul of a Crystal Sage Transposition

Sorceries.name: Soul Spear
Sorceries.description: • Sold by Orbeck of Vinheim for 5,000 souls.

Sorceries.name: Crystal Soul Spear
Sorceries.description: • Sold by Orbeck of Vinheim for 15,000 souls

Sorceries.name: White Dragon Breath
Sorceries.description: • Obtained by Soul of Consumed Oceiros Transposition

Sorceries.name: Soul Stream
Sorceries.description: • Found in Lothric Castle in the Grand Archives behind a hidden room with a Boreal Knight.

Sorceries.name: Soul Greatsword
Sorceries.description:
• Sold by Yoel of Londor for 5,000 souls
  • Sold by Yuria of Londor for 5,000 souls
  • Sold by Orbeck of Vinheim for 5,000 souls

Sorceries.name: Farron Flashsword
Sorceries.description: • Sold by Orbeck Of Vinheim for 3,000 souls

Sorceries.name: Magic Weapon
Sorceries.description:
• Sold by Yoel of Londor for 4,500 souls
  • Sold by Yuria of Londor for 4,500 souls
  • Sold by Orbeck of Vinheim for 3,000 souls

Sorceries.name: Great Magic Weapon
Sorceries.description: • From the Farron Keep Perimeter bonfire, turn around 180 and head towards the shortcut gate to Road of Sacrifices. The spell will be on a corpse at the gate.

Sorceries.name: Crystal Magic Weapon
Sorceries.description: • Sold by Orbeck of Vinheim for 10,000 souls

Sorceries.name: Magic Shield
Sorceries.description:
• Sold by Yoel of Londor for 4,500 souls
  • Sold by Yuria of Londor for 4,500 souls
  • Sold by Orbeck of Vinheim for 3,000 souls

Sorceries.name: Great Magic Shield
Sorceries.description: • Found in Irithyll Dungeon

Sorceries.name: Spook
Sorceries.description: • Sold by Orbeck Of Vinheim for 2,000 souls

Sorceries.name: Aural Decoy
Sorceries.description: • Sold by Orbeck of Vinheim for 2,000 souls

Sorceries.name: Pestilent Mercury
Sorceries.description: • Sold by Orbeck Of Vinheim for 1,000 souls

Sorceries.name: Cast Light
Sorceries.description: • Sold by Orbeck Of Vinheim for 1,000 souls

Sorceries.name: Repair
Sorceries.description: • Sold by Orbeck of Vinheim for 2,000 souls

Sorceries.name: Hidden Weapon
Sorceries.description: • Sold by Orbeck of Vinheim for 1,500 souls

Sorceries.name: Hidden Body
Sorceries.description: • Sold by Orbeck of Vinheim for 3,000 souls

Sorceries.name: Chameleon
Sorceries.description:
• Found near the Church of Yorshka bonfire in Irithyll of the Boreal Valley during Anri of Astora's questline. The spell will drop from an assassin disguised as a statue.
  • Found in the Darkmoon Tomb from the assassin's corpse if not killed earlier.

Sorceries.name: Twisted Wall of Light
Sorceries.description: • Sold by Orbeck of Vinheim for 6,000 souls

Sorceries.name: Deep Soul
Sorceries.description: • Obtained by Soul of the Deacons of the Deep Transposition

Sorceries.name: Great Deep Soul

Rings +1.name: Life Ring +1
Rings +1.description: • (NG+1) Located in the Undead Settlement. Behind Siegward while he is waiting to battle the fire demon.

Rings +1.name: Chloranthy Ring +1
Rings +1.description: • (NG+1) Irithyll of the Boreal Valley. Behind the pedestal with the Ring of the Sun's First Born on top of it. Easily accessible by falling from the ledge near Pontiff Sulyvahn's fog gate or walking from the Church of Yorshka.

Rings +1.name: Havel's Ring +1
Rings +1.description: • (NG+1) Archdragon Peak. From the altar that gives you the Twinkling Dragon Torso Stone, go back down the steps. The ring is to the right of the doorway.

Rings +1.name: Ring of Favor +1
Rings +1.description: • (NG+1) Can be found in the room of Pontiff Sulyvahn's bonfire, but is located upstairs. It can be either accessed by the shortcut in the room or taking the path around.

Rings +1.name: Ring of Steel Protection +1
Rings +1.description: • (NG+1) Untended Graves behind the tower that is unlocked by the Tower Key

Rings +1.name: Magic Stoneplate Ring +1
Rings +1.description: • (NG+1) Farron Keep bonfire before the swamp. From that bonfire, make a right and proceed to where the Basilisks are. The ring will be in this area.

Rings +1.name: Flame Stoneplate Ring +1
Rings +1.description: • (NG+1) Located in the Profaned Capital. In the area with the toxic swamp, climb up the building's ladder and walk along the curved part of roof until you see a hole in the wall to your right. Look down, directly across from the broken section of wall is a small ledge to drop onto and the ring will be on a corpse.

Rings +1.name: Thunder Stoneplate Ring +1
Rings +1.description: • (NG+1) Can be found near the Carthus Milkring, among the many pots in the Catacombs of Carthus

Rings +1.name: Dark Stoneplate Ring +1
Rings +1.description: • (NG+1) Lothric Castle Before entering the fog gate for the Dragonslayer Armour, head left and drop down to fight the Pus of Man on the white Wyvern. Next to the Wyvern is a room with a mimic and a doorway out to a balcony. This ring is located on right side the balcony.

Rings +1.name: Speckled Stoneplate Ring +1
Rings +1.description: • (NG+1) Cemetery of Ash. In the arena where you find the first Ravenous Crystal Lizard.

Rings +1.name: Bloodbite Ring +1
Rings +1.description: • (NG+1) Smouldering Lake, make your way through the Demon Ruins to find it in front of the ballista.

Rings +1.name: Poisonbite Ring +1
Rings +1.description: • (NG+1) Undead Settlement In the graveyard beside the white birch tree (Where the giant is shooting great arrows at you/enemies nearby) you'll find a well hidden in a corner. The ring is on a corpse behind the well.

Rings +1.name: Fleshbite Ring +1
Rings +1.description: • (NG+1) Located in the High Wall of Lothric. From the Tower on the Wall bonfire, head down to the roof with the transforming undead on it. Before descending the ladder to progress further, look to the nearby rooftop with fencing. Jumping will allow you access the rooftop and the ring will be on a corpse. (The item should be visible before jumping to the rooftop if you need confirmation)

Rings +1.name: Covetous Gold Serpent Ring +1
Rings +1.description: • (NG+1) From the Church of Yorshka bonfire in Irithyll of the Boreal Valley, proceed beyond the graveyard to the dark room with the Irithyllian Slaves. As you're exiting the room through the wide arched doorway, scan the right side for a broken section of railing where you can drop down. The ring will be on a corpse wedged in the corner of the ledge.

Rings +1.name: Covetous Silver Serpent Ring +1
Rings +1.description: • (NG+1) While progressing through Irithyll Dungeon, you'll find an elevator shortcut that heads to the first bonfire of the area. This ring is located on a ledge in the elevator room.

Rings +1.name: Lingering Dragoncrest Ring +1
Rings +1.description: • (NG+1) Found next to the giant crab just below the Crucifixion Woods bonfire in the Road of Sacrifices.

Rings +1.name: Sage Ring +1
Rings +1.description: • (NG+1) found in the rafters above the Archives. Drop down from the roof where the golden winged knights are located.

Rings +1.name: Wolf Ring +1
Rings +1.description: • (NG+1) Can be found on a corpse immediately outside the Keep Ruins bonfire building.

Rings +1.name: Ring of the Evil Eye +1
Rings +1.description: • (NG+1) Can be found just before Deacons of the Deep fight, at the back of the altar.

Rings +1.name: Wood Grain Ring +1
Rings +1.description: • (NG+1) Behind the first elevator in the Consumed King's Garden, at the bottom.

Rings +2.name: Life Ring +2
Rings +2.description: • (NG+2) Lothric Castle. From the dark room where you fight the pus of man in the wyvern's hand, head outside from the back exit. Turn right and drop down off the ledge. The ring is on a corpse. This version can be picked up here starting in NG+.

Rings +2.name: Chloranthy Ring +2
Rings +2.description: • (NG+2) From the first Road of Sacrifices bonfire, head to the wagon with the two Corvians. To the left is a crow mage. To the left of him there's a ledge that you can drop down to that has the ring.

Rings +2.name: Havel's Ring +2
Rings +2.description: • (NG+2) On a wooden beam below the Prison Tower bonfire in Irithyll of the Boreal Valley/Anor Londo, after Painting Guardian Curved Sword and the Painting Guardian Set.

Rings +2.name: Ring of Favor +2
Rings +2.description: • (NG+2) Located in the Cathedral of the Deep. From the Cleansing chapel bonfire, while facing the bonfire. go through the left shortcut, head up the elevator, climb the ladder behind the tower, drop down to the ledge, and follow the path to the top part of the chapel. To the left there is a hollow with a giant axe. behind him is this ring.

Rings +2.name: Ring of Steel Protection +2
Rings +2.description: • (NG+2) Located in the Catacombs of Carthus. From the Abyss Watchers Bonfire go down and head left until you find a bridge to your right. The bridge will be defended by a large skeleton carrying a sword and shield. Look down to the left and you will notice an item on a pillar. Drop down from the bridge onto the pillar to obtain this ring. Turn around to find the Carthus Pyromancy Tome.

Rings +2.name: Magic Stoneplate Ring +2
Rings +2.description: • (NG+2) Start from the Profaned Capital Bonfire. Take the ladder down into the tower and head through the hole in the wall. From there, turn right and go down the stairs. The ring is at the end of the stairs, on the edge of a cliff.

Rings +2.name: Flame Stoneplate Ring +2
Rings +2.description: • (NG+2) Located in the Demon Ruins. From the Old King's Antechamber bonfire, go down the immediate stairs and follow the path until you come to a fork in the path. Left will be an illusionary wall where there will be a Black Knight fighting a Ghru. The ring will be on a corpse near a wall, along with a Black Knight Sword.

Rings +2.name: Thunder Stoneplate Ring +2
Rings +2.description: • (NG+2) Can be found before the Dragonslayer Armour Boss in Lothric Castle. Before the boss fight there's a door lit by torches. Proceed trough the door and up the stairs. Turn left trough another door then left again to find a hole in the stone railing. Drop down to the ledge below and turn right. Follow the ledge to find this ring. The ring is on the same small rooftop that you would drop down to get Caitha's Chime, it's just on the opposite end.

Rings +2.name: Dark Stoneplate Ring +2
Rings +2.description: • (NG+2) Farron Keep, the Keep Ruins bonfire. Leave the room where you find 3 Ghru enemies on a bridge. Cross the bridge, you can find a dilapidated wall to your left. In front of the wall is a flame you need to extinguish to reach the Abyss Watchers. The ring is behind this wall, you'll need to roll through some crucifixes to reach it.

Rings +2.name: Covetous Gold Serpent Ring +2
Rings +2.description: • (NG+2) Archdragon Peak, in a large area that appears on defeating the Nameless King, on the right side of the arena from the gateway that the bonfire is under, the ring rests at the top of the third stairway. You can also find the Dragonslayer Set and a Titanite Slab in this area.

Rings +2.name: Covetous Silver Serpent Ring +2
Rings +2.description: • (NG+2) Undead Settlement. In the area after meeting Siegward with the Fire Demon, located on the roof of a shack in the far back of the area. Drop off the wooden ledge outside the room with two Cathedral Evangelists to access it.

Rings +2.name: Lingering Dragoncrest Ring +2
Rings +2.description: • (NG+2) Located in Lothric Castle. Before the Lothric Prince Boss fight, there is a dome shaped roof with three golden Winged Knights. Go up the spiral staircase at the center of the dome shaped roof. You'll encounter a ladder, don't go up the ladder, instead go around the ledge to find this ring on a corpse hidden in an alcove.

Rings +2.name: Sage Ring +2
Rings +2.description: • (NG+2) Located in the Consumed King's garden. When initially taking the elevator down, get off halfway to a ledge. Turn left and drop down onto some broken stairs. Pick up the item here and look to the left to find the ring on another set of broken stairs. You can get over there with a well-timed roll.

Rings +2.name: Wolf Ring +2
Rings +2.description: • (NG+2) Can be found in Cemetery of Ash, after the Iudex Gundyr boss fight. It's lying behind the golden door, on the left.

Rings +2.name: Ring of the Evil Eye +2
Rings +2.description: • (NG+2) Located in the High Wall of Lothric. From the second bonfire, head down to the roof with the first crystal lizard and the enemy that morphs. Climb the ladder down. Run past the spear wielding Lothric knight. Head down into the room with the estus shard on the mantle. The ring will be on the wall to the left, hidden behind a barrel.

Rings +2.name: Wood Grain Ring +2
Rings +2.description: • (NG+2) Irithyll of the Boreal Valley- Run past the room with the three Silver knights (room that contains Gwynevere's painting and Smough's hammer in a chest), go outside, turn right and the ring is located in an alcove.

Rings +3.name: Life Ring +3
Rings +3.description: • (NG+3) In Untended Graves behind Holy King Lothric's throne.
